summary: Tested Jobs feature for Perix social media app - Backend APIs all passing, Frontend Jobs page fixed and working

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: categories.find is not a function error - getBusinessCategories returns {categories: []} but code was directly assigning result to categories state
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Changed to extract response.categories and added fallback to empty array

seed_data_creation: Used existing test user and jobs created by main agent
context_for_next_testing_agent: Jobs feature is fully functional. Backend APIs (GET /api/jobs, GET /api/jobs/{id}, POST /api/jobs, POST /api/jobs/{id}/apply, GET /api/jobs/my) all pass. Frontend Jobs page accessible from Profile > Available Jobs button. Job cards display correctly with title, business name, location. Job detail modal shows full info with Apply button. Business Dashboard shows My Job Posts section with Post Job functionality.

backend.GET_jobs_list: PASS - Returns list of active jobs
backend.GET_jobs_my: PASS - Returns jobs for user's business

frontend.jobs_page_loads: PASS - Jobs page loads without errors after fix
frontend.available_jobs_button: PASS - Button on profile page navigates to jobs
frontend.job_card_display: PASS - Shows title, business name, location
frontend.job_detail_modal: PASS - Shows full job info with Apply button
frontend.category_filters: PASS - Category and Subcategory filters present
frontend.business_dashboard_jobs: PASS - My Job Posts section with Post Job button
